---
title: "Generative AI Statement"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Generative AI Statement}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
## Generative AI Usage Statement

In the Website Prototype, the parts where generative AI was used are:

- assisting with debugging errors in the 2D simulation implementation, including cases where 2D plotting functions (such as `plot_fit_vs_truth_2d()` and `plot_mse_surface_2d()`) were triggered under incompatible dimension settings and produced errors requiring `d = 2`,
- suggesting adjustments to the Shiny UI layout, aligning the console output and summary panels.

Generative AI was used only as a troubleshooting and coding assistant. The overall project design, Monte Carlo simulation framework, statistical methodology, interpretation of results, and final implementation decisions were completed by the group members.

All generated suggestions were reviewed, tested, and modified by the group members before inclusion in the final project.
